MixedUpSlimSims 0.0.1

    • Example Use of MixedUpSlimSims

get the ids and pops of founder nodes

founder_node_ids_and_pops.Rd

The "Founders" are defined according to the time they existed. You give a year (in tskit time) and this returns a list with two elements: $nodes—a vector of ids of the founder nodes, and $pops—a vector of the pops that the founder nodes belonged to.

Usage

founder_node_ids_and_pops(NI, FY)

Arguments

NI

a list with tibbles of tskit nodes and individuals like that returned by ts_nodes_and_inds().

FY

the year (in tskit time) in which individuals are designated as founders.

On this page
